creator: xenophon+freebsd@irtnog.org
text:
As of r309991, enabling the ZRTP configuration option causes the net/opal3 to depend on devel/libzrtpcpp via LIB_DEPENDS:

    .if defined(WITH_ZRTP)
    .if !defined(SAFE_ZRTP)
    IGNORE= please build devel/libzrtpcpp WITHOUT ports SSL and re-run build with SAFE_ZRTP set
    .endif
    LIB_DEPENDS+=   zrtpcpp.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libzrtpcpp
    CONFIGURE_ARGS+=        --enable-zrtp
    .else
    CONFIGURE_ARGS+=        --disable-zrtp
    .endif

However, the major version number of the libzrtpcpp shared library is now 2:

    cinep001bsdgw# pkg info -x zrtpcpp
    libzrtpcpp-2.3.2               ZRTP extension for GNU ccRTP
    cinep001bsdgw# ls -l /usr/local/lib/*zrtpcpp*
    lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel      15 Jan  5 22:49 /usr/local/lib/libzrtpcpp.so -> libzrtpcpp.so.2
    lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel      19 Jan  5 22:49 /usr/local/lib/libzrtpcpp.so.2 -> libzrtpcpp.so.2.3.2
    -rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  282120 Jan  6 09:23 /usr/local/lib/libzrtpcpp.so.2.3.2

This causes the build of net/opal3 to erroneously fail a dependency check:

    cinep001bsdgw# cd /usr/ports/net/opal3
    cinep001bsdgw# make
    ===>   opal3-3.6.6_17 depends on executable: gmake - found
    ===>   opal3-3.6.6_17 depends on shared library: pt-2.6.[4-9] - found
    ===>   opal3-3.6.6_17 depends on shared library: zrtpcpp.0 - not found
    ===>    Verifying install for zrtpcpp.0 in /usr/ports/devel/libzrtpcpp
    ===>   Returning to build of opal3-3.6.6_17
    Error: shared library "zrtpcpp.0" does not exist
    *** Error code 1

    Stop in /usr/ports/net/opal3.
    *** Error code 1

    Stop in /usr/ports/net/opal3.

Fix: 

Change the mentioned LIB_DEPENDS line to read as follows:

    LIB_DEPENDS+=   zrtpcpp.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libzrtpcpp
How-To-Repeat: Build net/opal3 with ZRTP enabled.  (SAFE_ZRTP may need to be set as well.)
